reflexion_entries_to_archive: P1 #target-chase-beats-message-cap #council-redesign: the per-MESSAGE displacement cap drafted for the slowed cruiser had two holes both externals found independently (spam bypass + pause-then-teleport via unclamped tick-delta). The fix that dissolved BOTH was a model change, not a parameter: store the cursor as a TARGET and chase it per-tick in the sim (hunter precedent) — spam now only moves the target, no dispatch-gate hack needed, and exact-snap-on-convergence (<=1 step => snap+clear) terminates without float-equality. LESSON: when a rate limit needs defending, move the authority from the message to the tick. Also: preview-tab rAF is throttled when occluded — pump app.ticker.update() manually to drive the REAL loop deterministically from eval.

P2 #param-injection-beats-field-addition: the Spawner is a main.ts-owned class, unreachable from snapshot(world) — instead of putting spawner state ON World (which would ride every 10Hz NetSnapshot unless remembered in the omission list), inject it as an optional snapshot() PARAMETER. Wire-safety then holds BY CONSTRUCTION (netSnapshot passes no opts) instead of by discipline, with Omit+destructure+test as backstops. LESSON: for host-only persistence data, prefer call-site injection over world-state expansion — the narrowest data path is the safest serializer.

P3 #inward-only-fuzz #verify-by-pixel-sampling: the fuzzy fog edge shipped INSIDE the existing brush footprint (wobble pulls the edge inward only, plateau untouched) so every fog.spec exact-RGB probe stayed valid BY GEOMETRY, not by re-tuning tests. Verified end-to-end by extracting the live maskRT and ring-sampling alpha at 24-48 angles (plateau 0, far 255, mid-band spread 75/255) — when a WebGL screenshot times out in an occluded preview window, extract.pixels IS the screenshot.

P4 #room-code-as-key-commitment #empirical-probe-before-dependent-code: the TOFU race died not by adding a handshake but by making the EXISTING shared secret (the room code) a pubkey fingerprint — zero UX change, zero protocol bump, zero deps (WebCrypto). Buffering+replaying the once-only Begin signal during async verify preserved the no-drop property the sync latch had. The Trystero same-selfId rejoin assumption (R3) was PROBED with a real-WebRTC e2e BEFORE the UI depended on it — it passed in 10.3s, converting a design bet into ground truth. Also: e2e spec bugs (missing canvasToCss, wrong waitForWorld arg order) masquerade as product failures — read the helper signatures before blaming the feature.

P5 #archaeology-before-execution: the CARRIED archive banner claimed the S69 P2 lobby refactor was 'never executed' — direct code reads + handoff archaeology proved it FULLY SHIPPED across four sessions. Executing the queued plan as-written would have redone shipped work and regressed the newer roster-based path the draft predates. LESSON: a plan file's own status header is a CLAIM, not ground truth — A.0-probe the code before re-running any carried plan, and when the banner is wrong, fix the banner as part of the close (never leave a known-false plan status for the next session to trip on).
